name: Egg Rice / Tian Jin Rice
ingredients: 1200g Leftover Chi Shiang Rice, cold and hard
steps: Cut the fermented mustard green to 1cm x 1cm size.
Preheat the wok, add in a generous amount of oil.
Once the oil is on medium high heat, add in the fermented mustard green, fry off for a bit.
Continue to fry it off until it's caramelised a bit on the edges.
Add more oil if need be.
Add the rice and fry. Make sure you separate every grain of rice.
It helps by breaking it off when prepping.
Once it's all fried off, keep in containers and keep in hot cupboard.
Mix all egg mix ingredients together. Mix well.
Keep in a jug, and store in the fridge.
Use the small upright holder pan to fry the egg. Use chopsticks when cooking to form velvety texture of the egg.
Make sure you drain/dry the spring onion before plating on the rice.
